summary: UI/UX refinement testing for CapyMatch - 8-part refinement verified. All 14 features tested successfully. Count consistency (headline matches CTA), school deduplication, CTA styling, color reduction, text compression, Target School hierarchy, and 'Review overdue actions' CTA all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: inbox-utils.js: getPrimaryHeadline returns '{N} overdue actions' format correctly
inbox-utils.js: getContextualCta returns 'Send follow-ups ({N})' with matching count
inbox-utils.js: dedupeSchools correctly merges 'Clemson' and 'Clemson University' into 'Clemson University'
CoachInbox.js: Critical card has full-width solid red button (w-full class + #dc2626 background)
CoachInbox.js: Up Next rows have subtle text CTA (background: none)
CoachInbox.js: School bullet dots use gray (#cbd5e1) not red
CoachInbox.js: Compressed line shows '↘ Worsening · Momentum dropping' format
SupportPod.js: SchoolRow hierarchy: Name → '1 overdue' (PRIMARY) → 'At Risk · In Conversation · 9d ago' (SECONDARY)
StatusIntelligence.js: Shows 'Review overdue actions' CTA (not 'View Details')
StatusIntelligence.js: Shows 'Follow-ups required to maintain momentum' subtext
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX 8-part refinement verified. Key changes: (1) Count consistency: headline '3 overdue actions' matches CTA 'Send follow-ups (3)'. (2) School dedup: Clemson University appears once (not Clemson + Clemson University). (3) Critical card: full-width solid red button. (4) Up Next: subtle text CTA. (5) Bullet colors: gray (#cbd5e1). (6) Compressed line: '↘ Worsening · Momentum dropping'. (7) Target School hierarchy: Name → overdue (PRIMARY) → status (SECONDARY). (8) 'Review overdue actions' CTA in attention section.
